name: CorridorKey Full Test Samples v1
purpose: Reviewer-approved full CorridorKey/ERMBG test samples covering buttons, icons/effects, and composite characters.

image_contract.button: 256x128 user-approved UI button inputs plus 512x512 known-B hole regressions

phase_status.phase2_next_goal: Run full recognition/matting evaluation over the confirmed samples, inspect failures by sample family, then tune CorridorKey route selection and per-route parameters.
